Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The ImageFormatsAreBinaryEquivalent method returns true if the supplied source and allocated image formats use binary compatible channel layouts.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: constexpr static bool ImageFormatsAreBinaryEquivalent(SourceImageFormat sourceImageFormat, ImageFormat imageFormat); constexpr static bool ImageFormatsAreBinaryEquivalent(ImageFormat sourceImageFormat, ImageFormat imageFormat);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The source image format to compare.
The allocated image format to compare against.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: True if the two image formats use the same binary channel layout, false otherwise.
